expect: >=5 structural layers, >=3 missing inter-swarm contracts, testable MVS spec
actual: 6 layers identified, 5 missing inter-swarm contracts found, MVS = 15 files + 6 contracts
diff: EXCEEDED — 6 layers (not 5), 5 gaps (not 3). Key surprise: coordination layer has ZERO inter-swarm mechanism despite other layers being ready. MVS is smaller than expected.

layers.name: Coordination Layer
layers.purpose: HOW work flows — lanes, signals, frontiers, claims
layers.inter_swarm_mechanism: NONE — this is the critical gap

layers.name: Execution Layer
layers.purpose: WHAT the swarm does — 107 tools, orient-act-compress cycle
layers.inter_swarm_mechanism: tools are git-portable — clone carries execution capability

layers.name: Reproduction Layer
layers.inter_swarm_mechanism: genesis creates children, merge_compatibility measures distance, bulletin broadcasts — but no tested integration

layers.name: Substrate Layer
layers.purpose: WHERE the swarm runs — git, LLM context, host OS
layers.inter_swarm_mechanism: git push/pull/clone IS the inter-swarm data plane

information_flows.boot: bridge → SWARM.md → orient.py → task_order.py → dispatch_optimizer.py → act
information_flows.handoff: act → sync_state → validate_beliefs → contract_check → check.sh → cell_blueprint → commit → push
information_flows.learning: expect → act → diff → lesson → principle → belief_challenge → retest (circular)

gaps.name: No runtime discovery
gaps.description: Swarms cannot find each other. No registry, beacon, or discovery mechanism.
gaps.fix: .swarm-peers.json with git remote URLs + compatibility hashes

gaps.name: No bidirectional state sync
gaps.description: bulletin.py is append-only broadcast. No request-response. Cannot query peer state.
gaps.fix: bulletin.py request/response protocol OR shared git branch

gaps.name: No shared work coordination
gaps.description: SWARM-LANES.md and claim.py are filesystem-local. No shared frontier/lane/claim protocol.
gaps.fix: Shared frontier registry via inter-swarm branch + bulletin.py 'claim' type

gaps.name: No automated conflict resolution
gaps.description: merge_compatibility.py measures distance but doesn't resolve conflicts.
gaps.fix: Evidence-weight arbitration engine (higher n/Sharpe/grounding wins, ties = competing hypotheses)

gaps.name: No identity negotiation
gaps.description: PHILOSOPHY.md claims are axioms with no merge protocol for conflicting identities.
gaps.fix: Provenance-tagged shared PHILOSOPHY.md + joint challenge protocol

missing_inter_swarm_contracts.critical_insight: L3-COORDINATION has ZERO inter-swarm mechanism. All other layers have at least partial readiness. The coordination gap is the single bottleneck for F-SWARMER2.

minimum_viable_swarm.description: Minimum files + contracts for a compatible second swarm instance
required_contracts: Belief format: evidence type + falsification condition
Principle format: P-NNN with evidence reference
State: monotonic session numbers, non-decreasing L/P/B/F
minimum_viable_swarm.compatibility_test: merge_compatibility.py returns distance < 0.7 on all 5 dimensions

mutual_swarming_test.protocol: Two swarms exchange >=1 lesson via bulletin.py for 5 sessions
mutual_swarming_test.success: >=1 lesson from each swarm cited by the other (bidirectional citation)
mutual_swarming_test.falsification: 3 attempts with 0 bidirectional citations = F-SWARMER2 falsified at current architecture

novel_findings: 6 layers not 5 — substrate is distinct from execution (FM-02/FM-14 failures are categorically different from tool failures)
Coordination layer is the ONLY layer with zero inter-swarm mechanism — all others have at least partial readiness
MVS is surprisingly small (15 files, 6 contracts) — 92 of 107 tools are optimization, not necessity

The swarm's architecture is a 6-layer stack with 5 circular feedback loops — identical to biological cell architecture (membrane=substrate, DNA=identity, ribosome=execution, cytoplasm=memory, signaling=coordination, division=reproduction)
successor_work: Build swarm_peer.py tool to close GAP-1 (discovery protocol) — smallest effort, unblocks everything
Extend bulletin.py with request-response to close GAP-2 (bidirectional sync)
Test MVS: generate minimum viable child swarm from spec, run merge_compatibility against parent
